name: unraid-mcp
description: Query, monitor, and manage Unraid servers via GraphQL API through MCP tools. Supports system info, Docker, VMs, array/parity, notifications, plugins, rclone, and live telemetry.

unraid_api_url.title: Unraid GraphQL API URL
unraid_api_url.description: Your Unraid server's GraphQL endpoint, e.g. https://tower.local/graphql. No trailing slash.

unraid_api_key.title: Unraid API Key
unraid_api_key.description: API key for your Unraid server. Found in Settings → Management Access → API Keys.
